---
id: organization-available-stacks-list
title: "List available stacks for an organization"
description: "List available stacks for the given organization. Returns stacks accessible to the organization, including any custom stacks."
sidebar_label: "List available stacks for an organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List available stacks for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/organizations/{org-slug}/available-stacks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List available stacks for the given organization. Returns stacks accessible to the organization, including any custom stacks.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
